headline: Is Target’s Wellness and Pokémon Push Reshaping Its Differentiated Assortment Strategy for TGT?
summary: In recent weeks, wellness brands NBPure, AG1, Butcher’s Bone Broth, Back to the Roots, and MUSH Foods have expanded onto Target shelves and endcaps, while an exclusive Pokémon x Target collection rolled out across apparel, home, and food categories in May and June 2026. These collaborations and category additions highlight Target’s push to deepen guest engagement in health, lifestyle, and fandom-driven products while strengthening its differentiated assortment. With analysts highlighting...
